subject: jp morgan equity swap basket confirmation

emails.subject: JP Morgan Equity Swap Basket Confirmation
emails.subject_base: JP Morgan Equity Swap Basket Confirmation
emails.body: JP Morgan Equity Swap Basket Confirmation Good Afternoon Sara, I wanted to follow up with you regarding the JP Morgan Equity Basket Swap Confirmation. Please advise if the language is acceptable or if you recommend any changes. Regards, Jorge

emails.subject: Re: JP Morgan Equity Swap Basket Confirmation
emails.subject_base: JP Morgan Equity Swap Basket Confirmation
emails.body: Re: JP Morgan Equity Swap Basket Confirmation Jorge: I haven't forgotten you. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Jorge A Garcia@ENRON 05/30/2001 02:29 PM

emails.subject: Re: JP Morgan Equity Swap Basket Confirmation
emails.subject_base: JP Morgan Equity Swap Basket Confirmation
emails.body: Good morning Sara, I was out yesterday. I was involved in a car accident. I was at a red light behind 6 cars and a Toyota Corolla slammed into the back of my Explorer. I was at a stand still, he was travelling at least 40 mph. I ended up with a severe case of whiplash. The other guys car was completely totalled. I'm sore today but ready to work. I listened to your messages this morning. Aneela Charania, X 30951, is aware of the transaction. I spoke with Jeff this morning and provided him with her phone number. Please advise if I can be of further assistance. Thanks for your response regarding the JP Morgan Equity Swap Basket Confirmation. Enjoy your day! Jorge From: Sara Shackleton@ECT on 06/06/2001 10:01 AM
